SL1019.name: VOID_RETURN_TYPE
SL1019.message: 'void' is not a valid return type

SL1020.name: EMBEDDED_FIELD_NOT_FIRST
SL1020.message: embedded field must be first in struct

SL1021.name: MULTIPLE_EMBEDDED_FIELDS
SL1021.message: only one embedded field is allowed

SL1022.name: EMBEDDED_TYPE_NOT_STRUCT
SL1022.message: embedded field type must be a struct

SL1028.name: INVALID_FN_GROUP_COLLISION
SL1028.message: function-group name collides with existing symbol

SL1031.name: IMPORT_ALIAS_INFERENCE_FAILED
SL1031.message: cannot infer package identifier; use 'import "{s}" as <name>'

SL1033.name: IMPORT_SIDE_EFFECT_ALIAS_WITH_SYMBOLS
SL1033.message: import with symbol list cannot use as _

SL1034.name: IMPORT_SYMBOL_ALIAS_INVALID
SL1034.message: import symbol alias '_' is not allowed

SL1035.name: IMPORT_FEATURE_IMPORT_EXTRAS
SL1035.message: feature imports must be path-only (no alias or symbol list)

SL1036.name: INFER_NULL_TYPE_UNKNOWN
SL1036.message: cannot infer type from null; add explicit type

SL1037.name: INFER_VOID_TYPE_UNKNOWN
SL1037.message: cannot infer type from void expression

SL1042.name: CONTEXT_UNKNOWN_FIELD
SL1042.message: unknown context field in with clause

SL1043.name: CONTEXT_DUPLICATE_FIELD
SL1043.message: duplicate context field in with clause

SL1045.name: WITH_CONTEXT_ON_NON_CALL
SL1045.message: 'with' context clause can only be applied to a call

SL1046.name: COMPOUND_TYPE_REQUIRED
SL1046.message: compound literal requires an explicit aggregate type

SL1047.name: COMPOUND_INFER_NO_CONTEXT
SL1047.message: cannot infer compound literal type from context

SL1048.name: COMPOUND_INFER_AMBIGUOUS
SL1048.message: compound literal type inference is ambiguous

SL1049.name: COMPOUND_INFER_NON_AGGREGATE
SL1049.message: inferred compound literal type is not an aggregate

SL1053.name: COMPOUND_MUT_REF_TEMPORARY
SL1053.message: cannot bind compound literal temporary to mutable reference

SL1054.name: COMPOUND_UNION_MULTI_FIELD
SL1054.message: union compound literal can initialize at most one field
